essential_assertions.text: assert forall|xi: int, yi: int| l as int <= xi && xi < yi && yi <= r as int implies !valid_pair(xi, yi, l as int, r as int) by { lcm_lower_bound(xi, yi); } assert(!pair_exists(l as int, r as int));

placeholders.original_text: assert forall|xi: int, yi: int| l as int <= xi && xi < yi && yi <= r as int implies !valid_pair(xi, yi, l as int, r as int) by { lcm_lower_bound(xi, yi); } assert(!pair_exists(l as int, r as int));
